summary:
POLITICAL FIGURES AND ASSASSINATION THREATS: Brandon recounts his visions of plots against Donald Trump's life, describing imagery of drones, snipers, and venomous snakes. He expresses concerns regarding Trump's safety during upcoming public events and details visions of the Secret Service moving the former president to a secure location. Brandon also shares about Marco Rubio protection, illustrating this with a vision involving a badger defending him.

GEOPOLITICAL CONSPIRACIES AND WAR: Brandon shares about international relations, sharing his belief in a conspiracy involving European bankers, global currencies, and spiritual forces of evil. He describes personal visions portraying international leaders like Emmanuel Macron and Volodymyr Zelensky as deceptive, alongside corruption and covert operations in Ukraine. Furthermore, Brandon outlines his visions of a looming global conflict involving Russia, Turkey, and Israel.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon shares about coordinated attacks on American infrastructure, recounting visions of armored dump trucks, derailed trains, and sabotaged communication networks. He describes disruptions to power grids, water supplies, and emergency services across major cities like Philadelphia and Chicago. He also details a specific vision of an explosive device utilizing copper coils in New Orleans, reflecting a heightened state of vigilance regarding domestic security.

NATURAL DISASTERS AND HEALTH CRISES: Brandon details his visions of global catastrophes, including severe earthquakes in Italy, China, and Indonesia, as well as a devastating underwater volcanic eruption near the Pacific Northwest. He expresses intense worry about deadly methane gas and massive tsunamis impacting coastal regions. Additionally, Brandon discusses his response to the Ebola outbreak in Africa, describing the suffering followed by a spiritual wave of healing and mercy that he believes will bring relief.

PERSONAL SPIRITUAL EXPERIENCES: Brandon shares his profound emotional responses to visions describing encounters with divine presence, angels, and pillars of fire that leave him feeling deeply moved. He asserts a personal conviction that his generation will witness the return of Jesus.

After it was over, I didn't want to leave it. The presence of the Lord was so strong. I could feel it all through the room and all through my house, and it's just so refreshing. One touch from the Father. I'm cold again, so I turned off the fan. Well, where do we start? Okay, we'll start with this. The Lord showed us time and time again to pray over the 14th, that there were plots and plans against Trump on his birthday. He gives you a piece. It says, "Pray over this. There's things about the 14th." I said, "The 14th was highlighted." And I saw the Lord circling. He said, "Pray about the 14th and Trump's birthday for his 80th birthday. Distractions are coming. Pray for his safety. Pray for him. Pray for these King's rallies. Pray for New York." And I saw fires. I saw the new Steven Spielberg movie coming out and the aliens, and talking about the "Alien Files." And they released that on the 13th. And they had those people in those red outfits with the blonde hair, and it was really creepy. 100 million people, 17,000 shares. It went viral in just a couple minutes and I thought, "Is this it?" But I still felt there was something wrong, but I couldn't really put my finger on it. So I just prayed over it. And when really the fire in New York with the bus, I was like, "Okay, that's kind of a big deal, I guess." You know, if you live in New York, but it's not really a big distraction. And it's just people being stupid. But I just kept praying and then when I saw he was going to the G7 summit and I saw him around Emmanuel Macron and what the Lord has told me to pray about this going clear into tomorrow—he comes home on Wednesday. Praying over his safety, praying over him as he is there and he departs around Pinocchio, you know, with the cocaine-snorting Pinocchio Zelensky. And I saw him again walking around with Macron and I said, "This guy is a mole. He is a weasel," and I saw that Emmanuel Macron is a weasel and that Zelensky is a Pinocchio and he is a puppet. And here he was, as I told you all what I saw about the billions of dollars that we've given them in aid—a lot of it went to slush funds to fund corruption. And I saw biolabs. I saw biolabs for things that were very dark in Ukraine. I saw secret missions with gold. And I saw there was a lot of evil over this area. For how long now? And it was early this morning. And look at this right here. Do you have it? "FBI reveals alleged plot to attack White House, UFC event, and more top headlines." Okay, they were going to use—"FBI breaks up alleged drone attack plot targeting White House, UFC event"—Fox News. They were going to use these drones to cause mass casualties over his birthday party. Why do you need to do that? You just follow the Holy Ghost. And so, I try really hard as a leader of all these people to just flow, but I know what I saw and I know it was accurate. It goes down the toilet and they pull it back and they just keep cleaning it and using it and cleaning it and using it, and it's nasty. And that's what they do in Dallas, too, I think. But now he was positive in any way. So we need to do this from the European side. Otherwise Europe will not have enough. Otherwise Middle East will not have enough. I don't know about Asia. Well, that don't make you good. And the problem that I have is I've seen Turkey and Syria in the days ahead and I saw a planned attack with people with red hats on marching out of Syria and Turkey. Ground troop invasion is coming from Turkey. And I saw red hats. And when this happened, the United States wasn't there. And the Lord said, 'Ezekiel 38 and 39 are at the door. The hook in the jaw.' You know Perry Stone and people like Rick Renner; those guys know the Word when it comes to tribulation and Revelation, and they've got it dissected and digested and spit up again like a cow. I know people say, 'Brandon, you say things like we're the generation that won't taste death. Is that you saying that or is that the Lord saying that?' No, that came out of prayer. You know what it came out of? I was concerned about my little girl, Megan. I was sitting before Him one day and I said, 'Lord, Megan is overcoming, but I'm getting older and my wife's getting older.' I was just having a conversation with Him and I asked, 'Should I have some kind of fund for her, a GoFundMe or something?' Back when I was living across from my grandmother, I said I didn't know what we were going to do to supply for her in the days ahead. I didn't want to worry about this, but she's getting older. We're all getting older here, and as a good father, you think, 'If I die and my wife dies, what's going to happen with my child who can't talk or bathe herself or do all these things?' As I was going over that, the Lord said to me, 'Brandon, you're not going to have to worry about that. You will be the generation that does not taste death.' I stopped and just started weeping because when I heard it, it was that clear. That's where I got that from. It came out of a lot of pain. When He warned me about it, I had peace and I've clung to that ever since. You will be the generation that will not taste death. I'm coming. Jesus is standing at the door. That's why I'm so dogmatic about saying it from the mountaintops to warn you of what I've heard in my own private prayer time. I want to always have an urgency in your heart that you realize we're running out of time. Jesus Christ is coming. If you truly have a relationship with Him, you can sense it. All I know is that God said, 'I want you to do this right now.' It won't always be like this, but there will be a day when He says don't, and when that day happens, I'll let you know. I saw two massive angels on both the right and left, and they had massive wings that were covering their faces. They could not look at Him. They died and went to hell, and God brought them back out of mercy. I saw them giving an account, and they had great influence in the African tribes and communities. When they gave an account of when they went to hell, they got born again and started witnessing to the people all throughout Africa. I saw people getting born again by the tens of thousands. These voodoo people—these African tribal men that were witch doctors—gave their hearts to Jesus Christ when they came back from hell. The Lord showed me to come against that Ebola virus, and we were praying over the people. As we prayed, I saw a dissipating of this. The DRC reported record numbers of Ebola cases in a single day as the outbreak hits the one-month mark, with 181 deaths since the outbreak began. I believe we made great ground concerning Africa and stopping this Ebola spread. I saw great revival coming to them. As I saw the rain begin to fall, I saw the glory coming on Africa and a shaking started to happen around the world. He said, 'It's time for the floodgates to open.' I saw the floodgates begin to open and the water begin to flow. Major rivers of revival are going to start to flow. I saw a shaking of these nations: Africa, Asia. He said, 'My goodness will pass by you, My mercy,' in another wave. I saw when Moses asked, 'Show me Your glory,' and He held him in the cleft of the rock. As the Lord passed, He said, 'I'll not allow you to see My face,' but as He passed by, His goodness and His mercy. The Lord said, 'It is the goodness of God that brings man to repentance.' Another wave of My goodness and mercy are going to flood this world one more time. I saw Him take His hand and breathe upon it, and goodness and mercy went over the people, along with the glory of the Lord and the former rain and the latter rain. A greater outpouring like we've ever seen before hit this earth like a Holy Ghost rushing wind. The Holy Ghost rushing wind, goodness, and mercy. And the Lord passed before him and proclaimed, "The Lord, the Lord God, merciful and gracious, longsuffering, abounding in goodness and truth, keeping mercy for thousands, forgiving iniquity and transgressions and sin, by no means clearing the guilty." That's not the one I was saying. Right. And the Lord passed before him and proclaimed the Lord, the Lord, the merciful and gracious. So he said, "Mercy and grace." Yes. But I don't believe that was the way it read last night, son. Was it? Okay. I saw mercy. That means different versions. Is that why?
